mergewith.subtemplate:
<!-- Typed parameters (created BEFORE use, to keep BEAUti happy) -->
<!-- Mean clock rate parameter. Use the package typed meanRateScalar input instead of BEAUti's standard clock.rate input. BEAUti auto-disables standard clock.rate estimation for uncalibrated analyses. --> <parameter id="SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" estimate="true" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.036"/>
<parameter id="SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" estimate="true" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.053"/>
<parameter id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" estimate="true" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.344"/>
<!-- Raw (relative) branch rates. Leave dimension unspecified so the clock model can initialise it from the tree. --> <parameter id="SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" estimate="true" domain="PositiveReal" value="1.0"/>
<!-- SVS indicator (0/1). The example analyses use a scalar indicator. --> <parameter id="SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.IntScalarParam" estimate="true" domain="Int" value="1"/>
<!-- Main clock model --> <branchRateModel id="SVSRelaxedClockMix.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.SharedRatesClockModelSpec" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" meanRateScalar="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" normalize="true"/>
<!-- SVS prior on raw branch rates --> <distribution id="SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.RelaxedRatesPriorSVS" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" sigma2Scalar="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ucldStdevScalar="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)"> <parameter id="SVSrootLogRate.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" name="rootLogRateScalar" domain="Real" estimate="false" value="0.0"/> </distribution>
<!-- Priors on hyperparameters -->
<!-- Negative M is valid when meanInRealSpace is FALSE (default). So we omit meanInRealSpace here. -->
<distribution id="SVSclockRateMix.prior.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.LogNormal" param="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"> <M spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="Real" value="-5.0" estimate="false"/> <S spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.5" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<distribution id="SVSsigma2Mix.prior.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.LogNormal" param="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)"> <M spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="Real" value="-4.0" estimate="false"/> <S spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="1.0" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<distribution id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.prior.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.distribution.LogNormal" param="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)"> <M spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="Real" value="-1.1" estimate="false"/> <S spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealScalarParam" domain="PositiveReal" value="0.6" estimate="false"/> </distribution>
<!-- Operators -->
<operator id="SVSclockRateMix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSclockRateMixUpTreeDown.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.inference.operator.kernel.BactrianUpDownOperator" scaleFactor="0.9" weight="3.0"> <up idref="SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"/> <down idref="Tree.t:$(n)"/> </operator>
<operator id="SVSsigma2Mix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSsigmaUCLNMix.scale.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" upper="10.0" weight="1.0"/>
<operator id="SVSrawRatesMix.oneScale.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.SingleRateScaleOperator" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSrawRatesMix.subtreeScale.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.SubtreeRateScaleOperator" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" weight="10.0" window="0.25"/>
<operator id="SVSindicatorMix.gibbs.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.IndicatorGibbsOperator" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" prior="@SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" weight="2.0"/>
<operator id="SVSacSubtreeU.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.ACSubtreeUIncrementOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" sigma2Scalar="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" rootLogRateScalar="@SVSrootLogRate.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" delta="0.25" internalOnly="true" allowRoot="false" maxSubtreeEdges="80" rejectIfNotAC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSucldSigmaNC.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.UCLDStdevNonCenteredOperator" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" ucldStdevScalar="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" window="0.20" rejectIfNotUC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSacSigma2NC.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.ACSigma2NonCenteredOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" sigma2Scalar="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" rootLogRateScalar="@SVSrootLogRate.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" window="0.15" rejectIfNotAC="true" weight="15.0"/>
<operator id="SVSucacBridge.c:$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.operator.UCACSwitchBridgeOperator" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" ratesVector="@SVSrawRatesMix.c:$(n)" indicatorScalar="@SVSindicatorMix.c:$(n)" ucldStdevScalar="@SVSsigmaUCLNMix.c:$(n)" sigma2Scalar="@SVSsigma2Mix.c:$(n)" rootLogRateScalar="@SVSrootLogRate.c:$(n)" minBranchLength="1e-12" weight="10.0"/>
<!-- Flag operator (weight=0) used to toggle mixture connectors --> <operator id="SVSmixtureFlagSVSMix.c:$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.operator.ScaleOperator" parameter="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)" scaleFactor="0.75" weight="0.0"/>
<!-- ========================================================= --> <!-- MixtureTreeLikelihood wrapper (strict + SVS relaxed) --> <!-- This reproduces the legacy-style mixture example: a 2-component mixture over --> <!-- tree likelihoods, with fixed weights. --> <!-- Component 0: strict clock using the SAME mean rate param --> <!-- Component 1: the default treeLikelihood.$(n) (SVS relaxed)--> <!-- ========================================================= -->
<!-- Strict clock model for the strict component --> <branchRateModel id="MixtureStrictClockSVSMix.$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.branchratemodel.StrictClockModel" clock.rate="@SVSclockRateMix.c:$(n)"/>
<!-- Strict component tree likelihood --> <distribution id="treeLikelihoodStrictSVSMix.$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.evolution.likelihood.ThreadedTreeLikelihood" data="@$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" useAmbiguities="true"> <siteModel idref="SiteModel.s:$(n)"/> <branchRateModel idref="MixtureStrictClockSVSMix.$(n)"/> </distribution>
<!-- Mixture tree likelihood (replaces treeLikelihood.$(n) in likelihood) --> <distribution id="mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.MixtureTreeLikelihood" data="@$(n)" tree="@Tree.t:$(n)" siteModel="@SiteModel.s:$(n)" branchRateModel="@SVSRelaxedClockMix.c:$(n)"> <subLikelihood idref="treeLikelihoodStrictSVSMix.$(n)"/> <subLikelihood idref="treeLikelihood.$(n)"/> <parameter id="w_topSVSMix.$(n)" spec="beast.base.spec.inference.parameter.RealVectorParam" domain="Real" dimension="2" estimate="false" name="weightsVector" value="0.3333333333333333 0.6666666666666666"/> </distribution>
<!-- Optional mixture diagnostics, matching the legacy-style XML example. --> <log id="mixtureAlloc.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.MixtureLikelihoodLogger" mixture="@mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)"/>
<log id="hierSVS.$(n)" spec="mixture.beast.evolution.mixture.HierarchicalSVSLogger" printRBStats="true" svsPrior="@SVSRelaxedClockMixPriorMix.c:$(n)" topMixture="@mixtureTreeLikelihoodSVSMix.$(n)"/>
Use mixture tree likelihood (strict + SVS)
SVS prior on branch rates (mixture package)
Clock rate prior
SVS sigma2 prior
SVS ucldStdev prior
Component 0 likelihood (strict)
Mixture likelihood
Mixture allocation diagnostics
Hierarchical SVS diagnostics
Scale clock rate
Up/down clock rate and tree
Scale sigma2
Scale ucldStdev
Scale single branch rate
Scale subtree branch rates
Gibbs update indicator
Perturb AC subtree whitened residuals
Non-centered UCLD stdev move
Non-centered AC sigma2 move
Bridge between UC and AC clock states
Mixture flag (do not sample)
